overall.description: A static cinematic shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the futuristic Night City skyline across a waterfront. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers with industrial smoke plumes, a distinctive red bridge spanning the water, and docked boats along the shore under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront dock with moored boats overlooking city skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from a fixed vantage point overlooking the water

entered.detail: dense cluster of towering skyscrapers with spires and neon signage characteristic of cyberpunk architecture
red suspension bridge spanning across the water with industrial supports
several small boats and watercraft moored along the sandy shore
multiple smokestacks emitting white steam/smoke among the downtown buildings
wooden and metal dock structures along the shoreline with small buildings
calm greenish water filling the foreground of the scene
tall vertical digital screen on the left edge of the frame displaying red imagery

segments.scene_description: A completely static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront. The camera overlooks calm waters with docked boats along the right shore, while a dense skyline of glass towers and industrial smokestacks rises in the distance. A prominent red bridge spans the waterway, and the bright midday sun casts warm light across the entire scene. No movement or action occurs throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, panoramic vista of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront bathed in the warmth of a midday sun. It begins with a wide view of calm waters where several boats are docked along the right shore. The perspective then extends across the waterway to a prominent red bridge that connects the foreground to a dense urban horizon. Finally, the scene settles on a towering skyline of glass skyscrapers and industrial smokestacks that rise sharply against the bright sky.
